intent: a real-time monitoring dashboard for a phase-3 clinical trial showing enrollment rates per site, dropout curves, and live adverse-event detection

deltas: Add a sticky bottom status strip at all times showing 'Last update: 4s ago' and a connection state indicator (green dot with 'Connected' text) — this must be persistent even when scrolling through adverse events table.

turn_log.delta: Add a sticky bottom status strip at all times showing 'Last update: 4s ago' and a connection state indicator (green dot with 'Connected' text) — this must be persistent even when scrolling through adverse events table.
turn_log.rationale: The clinical dashboard is missing a key element: a sticky bottom status strip showing last update time and connection state, which is critical for a monitoring interface.
